positive: A stunning, high-contrast symmetrical illustration of stylized mythological sea creatures and abstract geometric bioluminescent deep-sea flora. The design must have clean, thick, continuous silhouettes, resembling screen-printed vector art. Use a vibrant, ethereal color palette of electric indigo, neon teal, and glowing coral. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly detailed, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Style: Graphic novel meets Alphonse Mucha, flat graphic design, zero gradients, strong line work, celestial and marine influences, highly legible, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, fuzzy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, tiling, ugly, photorealistic, messy, realistic photography, gradients
